narrative:
North Royalton-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,055 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.7 percentage points.
